emails.body: Can you advise as to whether or not Li Xiao referred Alex to you last summer. I need to know this in order to process an employee referral (under old plan) for her. Forwarded by Linda Vargo/HOU/ECT on 02/14/2000 02:39 PM Li Xiao@ENRON 02/14/2000 11:19 AM
